generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures the swinging motion of the hoist",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors wind speed for real-time environmental data collection",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance PythonApplicationDevelopment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python for application development",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage for crane state data",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]
instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment of the digital twin system",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data communication between physical and digital components",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance CraneSwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing the swing angle of the hoist",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]
instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing wind speed for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for crane operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfidenceBounds
]
instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for system performance tracking",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]
instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure synchronization between physical and digital components",
    DTDFVocab:provides NotifyOperator
]
instance ConfidenceBounds : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confidence bounds derived from simulation models to support decision-making for optimal control"
]
instance NotifyOperator : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notification to operators to take action based on sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for system performance tracking"
]
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state for monitoring"
]
instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization, creating context and container diagrams to describe the lab scale gantry crane's structure and movement of pucks representing containers",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonApplicationDevelopment
]
instance HorizontalCartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for horizontal cart movement along the gantry rail"
]
instance VerticalHoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for vertical hoist operation"
]
instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet mounted on the hoist end-effector for container pickup and placement with controlled magnetic force"
]
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program that captures data from the physical crane and transmits via MQTT"
]
instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, HorizontalCartMotor, VerticalHoistMotor, Electromagnet, PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends movement trajectory commands to the Physical Crane Interface via MQTT. Specific command types, message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution procedures, and command execution confirmation details are not described in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is visualized using the C4 Model [5], comprising components such as a Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, and an MQTT Broker for signaling between services. The context and container diagrams detail the system's structure and coordination mechanisms."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements against simulation results using distance metrics, with thresholds for acceptable deviations to trigger error correction and maintain model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is used for inter-service communication between containers, with an MQTT Broker facilitating signaling. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability and redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The software is deployed on a personal computer with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. A Docker Compose file is provided to orchestrate the startup and shutdown of these containers."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Lab Scale Gantry Crane system implements the C4 Model standard for architecture visualization, as described in context and container diagrams to structure the system's software components and their relationships."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Continuous Validation Service compares real-time trajectory measurements against simulated trajectories, calculates distance metrics against an acceptable threshold, and notifies operators via the Grafana dashboard when deviations exceed the threshold to ensure operational safety."
]
